offer: For insurance brokers processing 10–20 claims/month, inefficient identification of exceptions causes delayed claim resolutions. We monitor claims data and flag exceptions instead of manual review of claims data.
problem: Inefficient identification of exceptions in claims data
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance brokers
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums

Engage in community groups for insurance tools
try_it: Let users try exception flagging and claims data monitoring on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with the one-liner

Provide early-access onboarding for first users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing claims
